name: poolmaster
description: Multi-tenant fantasy sports pool management platform

scripts.dev:infra: docker compose -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d postgres redis dynamodb
scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/core-api && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/poolmaster npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd packages/core-api && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/poolmaster npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd packages/core-api && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/poolmaster npx prisma migrate reset
